children.name: hwMflpIfName
children.description: The interface name of mac flapping, only used for trap.

children.name: hwMflpAlarmReason
children.description: The alarm reason of mac flapping, only used for trap.

children.name: hwMacHopTrafficSuppressCfgTable
children.description:
The mac flapping Traffic Suppress table .
	The table that contains the mac flapping information 
                 currently operating when brodcasting traffic suppress 
	occuring on this device.

children.name: hwMacHopTrafficSuppressCfgEntry
children.description: Entries of The mac flapping Traffic Suppress table.

children.name: hwMacHopTrafficSuppressDomainName
children.description: The domain name, only used for trap.

children.name: hwMacHopTrafficSuppressCmdType
children.description: The command type, only used for trap.

children.name: hwMacHopTrafficSuppressCir
children.description: The traffic rate , only used for trap.

children.name: hwMflpVsiCfgTable
children.description:
The mac flapping table .The table that 
                        contains the mac flapping information 
                        currently operating in VSI mode on this device.

children.name: hwMflpVsiCfgEntry
children.description: Entries of The mac flapping table in VSI mode.

children.name: hwMflpVsiName
children.description: The VSI name referring to the VSI which is correlative to the hwMflpVsiCfg table.

children.name: hwMflpVsiCfgRowstatus
children.description: The operating state of the row.

children.name: hwMflpVsiCfgIpAddr
children.description: The peer IP address, only used for trap.

children.name: hwMflpVsiCfgAcNameEx2
children.description: The AC interface name, only used for trap.

children.name: hwMflpVlanCfgTable
children.description:
The mac flapping table.The table that 
                        contains the mac flapping information 
                        currently operating in VLAN mode on this device.

children.name: hwMflpVlanCfgEntry
children.description: Entries of the mac flapping table in VLAN mode.

children.name: hwMflpVlanDetectMAC
children.description: The detect MAC, only used for trap.

children.name: hwMflpVlanCfgMacAddr
children.description: The MAC address, only used for trap.

children.name: hwMflpVlanCfgCycles
children.description: The number of interval.

children.name: hwMflpVlanCfgIfName
children.description: The interface name, only used for trap.

children.name: hwMflpVlanCfgDetectCycle
children.description: The interval of detecting the mac move-times.

children.name: hwMflpVlanCfgPreIfName
children.description: The interface name, only used for trap.

children.name: hwMflpVlanCfgLoopTimes
children.description: The number of mac move-times.

children.name: hwMflpVlanCfgAction
children.description:
The action switch of this entry. The meanings of
                         the values are:
                         block(1), alarmOnly(2)

children.name: hwMflpVlanId
children.description: The VLAN ID referring to the VLAN which is correlative to the hwMflpVlanCfg table.

children.name: hwMflpVlanCfgRowstatus
children.description: The operating state of the row.

children.name: hwMflpBdCfgTable
children.description:
The mac flapping table .The table that 
                        contains the mac flapping information 
                        currently operating in Bd mode on this device.

children.description: Entries of The mac flapping table in Bd mode.

children.name: hwMflpBdDetectMAC
children.description: The detect MAC, only used for trap.

children.name: hwMflpBdCfgIpAddr
children.description: The peer IP address, only used for trap.

children.name: hwMflpBdCfgVsiName
children.description: The VSI name referring to the VSI which is correlative to the hwMflpBdCfgEntry table.

children.name: hwMflpBdCfgAlarmReason
children.description: The alarm reason, only used for trap.

children.name: hwMflpBdIndex
children.description: The Bd ID referring to the BD which is correlative to the hwMflpBdCfg table.
